strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP frameworks
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
concerns: Resume name (Aisha Okonkwo) mismatches all online profiles (Szabo Bogdan)
No evidence of Master’s/PhD in AI or formal AI research credentials
Limited visibility of direct cloud platform or AI product ownership at scale
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates exceptional breadth in software engineering, with direct AI-agent infrastructure work and strong open-source contributions that align with the role’s builder mentality. However, the glaring identity discrepancy between name and digital footprint raises serious trust concerns, and while they have AI exposure, they lack formal AI credentials or demonstrable AI product ownership at the platform level required for a director-level IC role.
